WINDOW: 802.000s to 838.633s (smile at 822.000s to 823.633s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[722.850-1086.150] interviewee: After this camp in July, in August, we had the camp for all Poland, for all members in Poland in the mountains, in the Tatra Mountains. This was on the Polish-Czechoslovakian border high up in the mountains. This is part of the Carpathian. And there, there were mostly leaders. And we spent there four weeks too. In '39, it was about the end of

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
of the Carpathian.
